race.comment: WIN FOR BUSTER (2) comes here off a 112-day break and hasn't been sighted since. A couple of gear changes in the break can see him return to his best form with the stable's strike jockey booked for his return. Can go one better. I LOVE YA MONEY (5) is another lining up here off a freshen, being 65-days between runs and has switched to the Pateman stable in the break. The blinkers go on for the first time and Pike hopping on board suggests he's ticking all the boxes at home. Can return with a bang. CALL ME INVINCIBLE (3) was a touch disappointing last start but that form has already worked out well. Third-up now and back to 1200m can see him put his best foot forward. LONG LAUGH (1) is third-up now and draws a much better gate than his latest outing. Can be in the finish again. RED ZED (10) won't be far away with the aid of an inside barrier.
